runs.notes: K=4 aggregator outer UltraHonk proof; verifies 4 inner private-transfer proofs in one Soroban tx. proveMsTotal includes inner+outer; bb CRS first download (~256 MB) is cached after.

summary.note: Recursive line is structurally flat in N (single UltraHonk verify regardless of inner count). Naive line is linear (30,556 stroops × N). Crossover with naive at N≈4.5; at N=64 the recursive line is ~14× cheaper than naive, at N=1024 it is ~230× cheaper. Batched Groth16 is the cheapest at small N (no UltraHonk overhead) but grows with N+3 pairings; the recursive line wins outright at large N.

portability.claim: Same BN254 Groth16 proof bytes (Tier 1 single-proof) verify on both Stellar testnet AND EVM. Demonstrates the curve-portability that makes a single privacy-pool circuit portable across ecosystems.

evm.note: Local Foundry EVM (anvil). Gas, not stroops — different fee markets, not directly comparable in absolute units, but the SAME proof bytes are accepted by both verifiers because both implement the standard BN254 Groth16 pairing equation.
